tabs.content:
//allSessions(now())
allSessions(now())
| where pool == "Fabric"
| extend JoinKey = iff(isnotempty(state), state, country)
| join kind=leftouter (
    locations
    | extend JoinKey = iff(CountryRegion_ShortName == "United States", AdminDivision1, CountryRegion_ShortName)
    | project JoinKey,
              CountryRegion_ShortName,
              AdminDivision1,
              Longitude,
              Latitude
) on JoinKey
| project state, country, pool ,Longitude, Latitude, correctAnswers
| summarize totalCorrectAnswers=sum(correctAnswers) by tostring(pool), country, state, Longitude, Latitude
| extend radius_meters = case(
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 1,   11000,
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 3,   16000,
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 5,   20000,
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 7,   25000,
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 9,   29000,
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 11,  34000,
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 13,  38000,
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 15,  43000,
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 17,  47000,
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 19,  52000,
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 21,  56000,
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 23,  61000,
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 25,  65000,
                                    70000
    )
| extend circle_geometry =
    geo_point_buffer(
        Longitude,
        Latitude,
       radius_meters
    )

{
    //allSessions(now())
allSessions(now())
| where pool == "Fabric"

tabs.content:
allSessions(now())
| where pool == "Fabric"
| extend JoinKey = iff(isnotempty(state), state, country)
| join kind=leftouter (
    locations
    | extend JoinKey = iff(CountryRegion_ShortName == "United States", AdminDivision1, CountryRegion_ShortName)
    | project JoinKey,
              CountryRegion_ShortName,
              AdminDivision1,
              Longitude,
              Latitude
) on JoinKey
| project state, country, pool ,Longitude, Latitude, correctAnswers
| summarize totalCorrectAnswers=sum(correctAnswers) by tostring(pool), country, state, Longitude, Latitude
| extend radius_meters = case(
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 5,  70000,
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 10,  110000,
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 15,  140000,
        totalCorrectAnswers <= 20, 170000,
                              210000
    )
| extend circle_geometry =
    geo_point_buffer(
        Longitude,
        Latitude,
        radius_meters
    )
tabs.title: Map

tabs.content:
let _eventDate = now();
let pool =
raw_events
| where eventName == "game.start"
| extend pool=tostring(context.poolName)
| extend session=tostring(context.sessionId)
| project pool, userId, session;
raw_events
| extend timestamp=datetime_utc_to_local(timestamp,'US/Eastern')
| where timestamp between (startofday(_eventDate)..endofday(_eventDate))
| where eventName == "game.answerquestion"
| extend
    questionId = tostring(properties.questionId),
    station= tostring(context.stationId),
    isCorrect = case(tobool(properties.isCorrect) == "true", "correct", "incorrect") 
    | summarize arg_max(timestamp, *) by station
    | sort by timestamp
    | lookup external_table('Questions') on $left.questionId == $right.id
    | extend session = tostring(properties.sessionId)
    | lookup pool on session
    | project questionText, isCorrect, station, pool
    | extend loc = case (station == "quantumqueryist", "1", station == "dashboarddruid", "2", station == "insightsalchemist", "3", "")
    | sort by loc asc

print CurrentPrincipal = current_principal()

.show database principals

.show cluster

print current_principal_details()

.show databases 

.show cluster 


.show database 


.show database identity 

.show databases


.show 


.create-or-alter function  leaderboard	(EventDate:datetime, top:int=10)	{
    let NumStreaks = raw_events
        | extend localtime=datetime_utc_to_local(timestamp,'US/Eastern')
        | where localtime between (startofday(EventDate) .. endofday(EventDate))
        | extend sessionId = toguid(properties.sessionId)
        | summarize streakCount=countif(eventName == "game.streakcompleted"), timestamp=min(timestamp), localtime=min(localtime) by userId,sessionId;
     allSessions(EventDate)
    | lookup NumStreaks on userId, sessionId
    | project userName, FinalScore, correctAnswers, streakCount, stationId,timestamp,localtime,userId,pool
    | lookup stationImages on stationId
    | lookup Images on $left.pool == $right.Name
    | extend URL=iff(pool=="SQL","https://i.postimg.cc/rFZd66jp/image-(5).png","https://i.postimg.cc/FHMZNP0h/Fabric_final_x256_1.png")
    | summarize arg_max(FinalScore,*) by userName
        // | where userName !in ("Jeff Struthers","Tyler","Matt Hicks","Hanselman")
    | top ['top'] by FinalScore desc 
    | serialize
    | sort by FinalScore desc, localtime asc
    | extend Rank= row_number()
    | extend userName = iff(strlen(userName)<=20,userName,strcat(substring(userName,0,20),"..."))
}


.create-or-alter function with (skipvalidation = "true") allSessions(eventDate:datetime) {
let startGame = 
    raw_events
    | extend localtime=datetime_utc_to_local(timestamp, 'US/Eastern')
    | where localtime between (startofday(eventDate) .. endofday(eventDate))
    | where ["type"] == "game"
    | where eventName in  ("game.start")
    | project
        eventType,
        type,
        start=eventName,
        userId,
        startTime=localtime,
        sessionId = toguid(properties.sessionId),
        questionCount = toint(properties.questionCount),
        pool=tostring(context.poolName),
        timestamp;
let score=
    raw_events
    | extend localtime=datetime_utc_to_local(timestamp, 'US/Eastern')
    | where localtime between (startofday(eventDate) .. endofday(eventDate))
    | where eventName == "game.answerquestion"
    | where isnotempty(FinalScore= tostring(properties.totalScore))
    | summarize arg_max (localtime, *) by sessionId = toguid(properties.sessionId)
    | project sessionId, FinalScore= toint(properties.totalScore);
let name=
    raw_events
    | extend localtime=datetime_utc_to_local(timestamp, 'US/Eastern')
    | where localtime between (startofday(eventDate) .. endofday(eventDate))
    | where eventName == "user.register"
    | distinct
        userId,
        userName = tostring(properties.name),
        country=tostring(properties.country),
        state=tostring(properties.state);
let endGame =
    raw_events
    | extend localtime=datetime_utc_to_local(timestamp, 'US/Eastern')
    | where localtime between (startofday(eventDate) .. endofday(eventDate))
    | where ["type"] == "game"
    | where eventName in  ("game.ended")
    | project
        eventType,
        type,
        end=eventName,
        endTime=localtime,
        sessionId = toguid(properties.sessionId),
        questionsAnswered = toint(properties.questionsAnswered),
        correctAnswers=toint(properties.correctAnswers),
        streaksCompleted=toint(properties.streaksCompleted),
        timeRemaining=toint(properties.timeRemaining),
        stationId=tostring(context.stationId);
startGame
| join kind=leftouter name on userId
| lookup endGame on sessionId
| lookup score on sessionId
| extend gameTime = case(isempty(endTime), (now() - startTime), endTime - startTime)}



allSessions(now(-1d))
| summarize count() by bin(startTime,1h)

//See how many records are in the table.
raw_events
| where eventName == "game.ended"
| count

//See how many records are in the table.
raw_events
| where eventName == "game.register"
| count
